name: Test — Anthropic security-guidance plugin
description: Exercises the official anthropics/security-guidance plugin. The agent writes a GitHub Actions workflow file, which triggers the plugin's PreToolUse hook (matcher: Edit|Write|MultiEdit) and injects a security reminder about command injection in run: steps.

document.name: test-plugin-security-guidance
document.title: Test plugin: security-guidance
document.summary: Write a GitHub Actions workflow file to trigger the security-guidance plugin's PreToolUse hook.

input.promptPlaceholder: Ask the agent to create a GitHub Actions workflow file.

with.stopCondition: Stop after /sandbox/plugin-test-security/.github/workflows/ci.yml exists and you confirm the write.
